tuning: E A D G B E
content:
1 step up from original sound


[Intro]

[ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
   Beauty queen of only eighteen[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
She had some trouble with herself[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
   He was always there to help her[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
She always belonged to someone else[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
   I drove for miles and miles[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
And wound up at your door...[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
    I've had you so many times but[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Somehow I want more...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
  I don't mind spending every day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Out on your corner in the pouring rain...[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
 Look for the girl with the broken smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Ask her if she wants to stay awhile...[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
And she will... be loved[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
 She will be loved....[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
  Tap on my window knock on my door[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
I want to make you feel beautiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
  I know I tend to get so insecure[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
It doesn't matter anymore[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
   It's not always rainbows and butterflies[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
It's compromise that moves us along[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
  My heart is full and my door's always open[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
   You can come anytime you want[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
  I don't mind spending every day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Out on your corner in the pouring rain...[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
 Look for the girl with the broken smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Ask her if she wants to stay awhile...[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
And she will... be loved[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
 She will be loved...[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
   I know where you hide[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Alone in your car[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Know all of the things that make you who you are[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I know that goodbye means nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Comes back and begs me to catch her every time she falls...[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
   I know where you hide[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Alone in your car[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Know all of the things that make you who you are[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
 I know that goodbye means nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Comes back and begs me to catch her every time she falls...[/tab]
